scripts.dev:web: npm run build -w @hayfever/core && npm run dev -w @hayfever/web
scripts.mobile: npm run build -w @hayfever/core && npm run start -w @hayfever/mobile
scripts.build: npm run build -w @hayfever/core && npm run build -w @hayfever/api && npm run build -w @hayfever/web && npm run typecheck -w @hayfever/mobile
scripts.lint: npm run build -w @hayfever/core && npm run lint -w @hayfever/web && npm run typecheck -w @hayfever/api && npm run typecheck -w @hayfever/mobile
